steps.title: Isolate the square
steps.content: Start with $k^2-53=91$. Add $53$ to both sides so the square term is alone: $$k^2=144.$$

steps.title: Take both roots
steps.content: If $k^2=144$, then $k=12$ or $k=-12$. The question asks for the positive solution, so keep $12$ and reject $-12$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice D is correct because $12^2-53=144-53=91$. The larger answer choices would make $k^2$ far too large.
